FI dr. Ferdi Iskandar Clinical Intelligence / Indonesia
Impact Systems Thinking Brief Vision Contact
Sentra Healthcare AI · Melinda DHAI
Founder / Physician / Systems Architect

Human care, augmented by intelligence.

01 CEO & Founder Sentra Healthcare Artificial Intelligence
02 Visionary Leader Melinda DHAI digital health transformation
03 Global Tech Ecosystem Google Developer Program · Premium Tier Member
04 AI Innovation Minimax Developer Program · Kaggle dev & researcher
“Teknologi terbaik adalah yang bekerja dalam diam untuk mendukung keselamatan pasien dan memberi ruang bagi tenaga medis untuk kembali pada esensi mereka: memperhatikan manusia.” — dr. Ferdi Iskandar
Read the vision Explore systems
Bridging Human Care

Leadership with clinical gravity.

Profil ini tidak dibangun sebagai portofolio teknologi yang bising. Ini adalah catatan kerja seorang dokter-founder yang menggunakan AI sebagai infrastruktur pendukung keputusan, bukan pengganti manusia.

01

Sentra Healthcare Artificial Intelligence

Membangun arsitektur sistem klinis yang membantu tenaga medis membaca sinyal, risiko, dan konteks secara lebih cepat dan terstruktur.

02

Melinda DHAI

Transformasi digital kesehatan yang berangkat dari kebutuhan operasional nyata, keselamatan pasien, dan standardisasi layanan.

03

Human-AI Collaboration

AI ditempatkan sebagai lapisan augmentasi: memperkuat penilaian klinis, mengurangi beban administratif, dan menjaga keputusan tetap manusiawi.

04

Indonesia-first Healthcare AI

Fokus pada relevansi lokal, infrastruktur yang realistis, dan sistem yang dapat tumbuh dari prototype menuju deployment institusional.

05

Prompt and Transformer Architect

Merancang prompt system, reasoning pattern, dan pemanfaatan transformer agar AI bekerja lebih terarah, konsisten, dan dapat dikendalikan.

06

Director of System Choreography

Menyusun orkestrasi antar sistem, agent, workflow, dan decision layer agar teknologi bergerak sebagai satu ekosistem yang koheren.

07

Chief Automation Conductor

Mengarahkan automasi agar tidak sekadar mempercepat pekerjaan, tetapi mengurangi friction, menjaga konteks, dan meningkatkan reliability operasional.

08

VP of Process & Service Coordination

Menghubungkan proses layanan, koordinasi manusia, dan sistem digital agar pengalaman kerja klinis menjadi lebih jelas, rapi, dan terukur.

Accountable by choice.
Built for care.

✧ Sentra Healthcare AI
Section 03

Not products for show.
Systems for care.✷

Each system in this registry exists to solve a real problem in care delivery. From the first conversation to long-term outcomes, our systems work together—responsibly, transparently, and always with people at the center.

Sentra Healthcare AI Systems Registry
“

Technology is not the goal. Better care is. Everything we build is a means to that end.

Sentra Healthcare AI
Featured System 01

AADI

Autonomous Admission & Documentation Intelligence

AADI autonomously gathers, verifies, and documents patient information across systems—reducing friction at admission and improving accuracy from the start.

StatusSedang Diuji
Explore system →
Featured System 02

Sentra Assist

AI Chrome Side Panel for Full EMR Completion

Sentra Assist is an advanced AI-powered Chrome Side Panel that reads clinical documents, performs OCR extraction, and applies probabilistic field-matching algorithms to complete EMR forms end-to-end with clinician review.

StatusSedang Diuji
Explore system →
“

Our systems are designed in partnership with clinicians and patients. Their trust is earned, not assumed.

Sentra Healthcare AI
22SystemsAcross the care continuum
4Status GroupsTesting, built, in build, planned
1CommitmentBetter decisions. Better care.

Clinical Intelligence
Edition 05 • May 2025
Founder Notes / 05
Section 02 ✧
Engineering Intelligence

The Thinking Stack

AI should not make healthcare louder.
It should make healthcare clearer,
calmer, and more accountable.

The Thinking Stack is an open orchestration field for building responsible clinical intelligence.

It aligns multidisciplinary expertise across roles and systems—designed not as a pipeline to automate, but as a system to reason, reflect, and elevate human judgment.

Principle

Clarity over volume.
Accountability over speed.

Design

Human-centered orchestration.
Transparent by design.

Outcome

Intelligence that supports better decisions and better care.

An open orchestration field inspired by Langflow—translated into an editorial system.

Each role contributes distinct reasoning capabilities.

Together, they form a deliberative architecture for clinical intelligence.

✣
Input

Clinical
Complexity

Unstructured, variable, and high-stakes.

Processing

Intelligence Engineer
& Systems Architect

Merekayasa fondasi sistem yang mampu belajar, beradaptasi, dan tetap dapat diaudit.

Processing

Autonomous
Systems Strategist

Mengubah otomatisasi menjadi otonomi terbatas yang tidak mengambil alih tanggung jawab klinis.

Processing

Principal of
Augmented Engineering

Mendesain teknologi sebagai ekstensi kapasitas intelektual manusia.

Processing

Neural Infrastructure
Designer

Membangun jaringan data, retrieval, dan reasoning untuk mengekstrak sinyal klinis.

Processing

Cognitive Architecture
Engineer

Merancang alur berpikir yang menjelaskan alasan, batas, ketidakpastian, dan rekomendasi.

Output

Responsible
Clinical Intelligence

Clearer insights. Better decisions. Safer care.

Fig. 02.01
The Thinking Stack orchestration field.
Roles are connected through purpose, not just process.
SourceFounder Notes Lab
NoteNot a workflow.
A way of thinking.
StatusIn continuous refinement
Last UpdatedMay 12, 2025
✧
Artificial Intelligence Intelligence Brief

Signals worth watching.

Bukan feed berita generik. Ini adalah ruang editorial untuk membaca arah AI yang relevan dengan kesehatan: model lokal, clinical safety, governance, dan workflow adoption.

Local-first medical intelligence

AI kesehatan tidak selalu harus cloud-only. Untuk banyak konteks Indonesia, local inference, privacy boundary, dan modular deployment dapat menjadi pembeda strategis.

Signal / Infrastructure

Clinical trust is a product feature

Trust tidak muncul dari model yang besar saja. Trust lahir dari audit trail, explainability, calibration, dan proses validasi bersama klinisi.

Signal / Governance

From chatbot to care layer

Nilai AI di kesehatan akan bergeser dari percakapan menuju lapisan kerja: triage, documentation, retrieval, risk scoring, and clinical coordination.

Signal / Product

Bridging Human Care with Artificial Intelligence.

Dedikasi saya berakar pada konvergensi antara presisi klinis dan arsitektur kognitif buatan. Sebagai praktisi medis aktif dan founder, fokus saya adalah mengembangkan sistem yang membantu mengekstrak sinyal dari kebisingan data klinis.

Visi ini bukan tentang substitusi, melainkan augmentasi. AI seharusnya membantu dokter melihat pola lebih cepat, mengurangi beban administratif, dan menjaga konteks keputusan tetap jelas.

Melalui Melinda DHAI dan Sentra Healthcare Artificial Intelligence, saya berupaya membangun infrastruktur kesehatan yang berbasis empati, validasi data, dan standar teknis yang dapat dipercaya.

Insights & Reflections

Field notes from medicine, law, and intelligence systems.

Tulisan dan refleksi strategis yang dapat dikembangkan menjadi blog, memo founder, atau halaman insight.

Manifesto

Sentra Healthcare Solutions

Mendisrupsi krisis kesehatan melalui kolaborasi manusia dan AI yang bertanggung jawab.

Architecture

The Genesis Matrix

Catatan tentang bagaimana sistem healthcare AI dapat dibangun dari fondasi data, workflow, dan reasoning.

Sentinel

The Sentinel Grid

Kerangka monitoring real-time untuk membaca sinyal risiko dan anomali pada sistem kesehatan.

Connect

Let’s build what healthcare actually needs.

Untuk kolaborasi strategis, pengembangan produk healthcare AI, atau diskusi tentang clinical intelligence infrastructure, gunakan jalur kontak resmi yang akan disambungkan di sini.

Sentra Healthcare AI↗ Melinda DHAI↗ Direct Contact↗

/FAQ.

Answers to the stuff people usually ask and space to ask your own.

Ask a question

Ask a question

/How long does a typical project take from start to finish?

Most projects are completed within 6-10 weeks, depending on complexity. During our initial consultation, we'll provide a specific timeline based on your unique requirements.

/What makes your agency different from others?

We optimize your site structure, content, and speed, ensuring better search rankings and visibility.

/Do you offer ongoing support after the project launches?

You pay a fixed monthly fee, and we handle everything—design, updates, and ongoing support. No large upfront costs, just a seamless experience.

/What if I only need one specific service, not the full package?

Yes! We can refresh your current site while improving its design, functionality, and performance.

/Do you offer SEO services?

Just reach out! We’ll discuss your needs, create a plan, and get to work on your website.
